privileged_info_summary: The Organ of Corti is a real ImageJ built-in sample available through Fiji's File > Open Samples menu and can be downloaded from the ImageJ image collection at https://imagej.net/ij/images/. The actual sample file (organ-of-corti.zip) is 2.9MB in size, NOT 58KB as claimed in the task metadata. The expected output path (/home/ga/ImageJ_Data/results/directionality_results.csv) is correct and matches the task scripts. The Directionality analysis tool is a legitimate ImageJ plugin that measures orientation distributions and produces statistics including Preferred Direction and Dispersion (standard deviation). The bin count, angular range, and dispersion bounds specified in the task are plausible but their specific values for the Organ of Corti sample have not been independently verified against the actual sample data.
